title: ageratina aromatica
intro: Ageratina aromatica, also known as Mexican oregano or Mexican mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ageratina aromatica include its ability to act as an antioxidant, reduce stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and insomnia. Ageratina aromatica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
